name: age-of-agents
description: Age of Agents — wizualizacja sesji Claude Code jako gra RTS w pixel-arcie
author: Mateusz Pawelczuk

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @agent-citadel/server" "npm run dev -w @agent-citadel/client"
scripts.demo: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @agent-citadel/server -- --demo" "npm run dev -w @agent-citadel/client"
scripts.test: npm run test -w @agent-citadel/server && npm run test -w @agent-citadel/client
scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:server
